settings.heading: Treats, toys & love for the whole pack
settings.subheading: Curated pet essentials inspired by three rescue pups. Every wag, woof, and order helps fund animal rescues we love.

settings.heading: Tail-wagging favorites
settings.subheading: Hand-picked goodies our pack approves of.

settings.name: Jack
settings.bio: His previous owners traveled often for work and couldn't give him the attention he needed. Today, Jack is the calmest member of the pack and an expert sunbeam-finder.

settings.name: Sophie
settings.bio: Sophie was left behind during quarantine — her previous family said they couldn't keep her. Their loss; our luckiest day. She greets everyone like a long-lost friend.

settings.name: Molly
settings.bio: Molly's first owners couldn't afford to care for her. She came to us scared and unsure — now she's pure goofy puppy joy and the reason we started this shop.

settings.text: Salmon treats are a HIT in my house. Bonus points for the cute packaging and the donation to rescues!
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.text: Such warm, thoughtful packaging. You can tell real pet parents are behind this brand. Will absolutely reorder.
settings.author: Marcus T.

settings.text: Knowing 1% goes to rescues makes every purchase feel meaningful. Plus, the harness fits my pup perfectly!
settings.author: Priya K.
